creator: scorpio@drkshdw.org
text:
mudix has an empty files/patch-aa   it's not needed.
If the commiter knows a way using cvs -q diff for me to show added/removed files,  I'd 
appreciate an email back.  I normally use cvs -q diff -u but that doesn't add/remove files 
in the diff.   ( I'm thinking along the lines of something like  diff -urN /dev/null 
new/file,  only with it checking against the CVS repository,  if this makes any sense.)

Fix: 

delete patch-aa
